title: Bayesian Chronological Modeling

title: Bayesian Chronological Modeling
text: Please note ananke project released Contributor Code Conduct. contributing project, agree abide terms.

title: ananke: Bayesian Chronological Modeling — ananke-package
text: ananke uses following options() configure behavior: ananke.progress: logical scalar. progress bars displayed? ananke.oxcal: character string specifying path OxCal executable.

title: ananke: Bayesian Chronological Modeling — ananke-package
text: Full list authors contributors (alphabetic order) Package maintainer Nicolas Frerebeaunicolas.frerebeau@u-bordeaux-montaigne.fr Archéosciences Bordeaux (UMR 6034) Maison de l'Archéologie Université Bordeaux Montaigne 33607 Pessac cedex France

title: 14C Calibration with OxCal — oxcal_calibrate
text: names character vector specifying names dates (e.g. laboratory codes). dates numeric vector giving BP dates calibrated. errors numeric vector giving standard deviation dates calibrated. curve character string specifying calibration curve used.

title: 14C Calibration with OxCal — oxcal_calibrate
text: list following elements: ocd list holding ranges, probability distributions, etc. parameter. model list containing information model. calib list containing information calibration curve.

title: 14C Calibration with OxCal — oxcal_calibrate
code: if (FALSE) { ## Download OxCal oxcal_setup()  ## Calibrate 14C dates cal <- oxcal_calibrate(   names = c("X","Y"),   dates = c(5000, 4500),   errors = c(45, 35) )  plot(cal) }

title: Download OxCal — oxcal_download
text: path character string specifying directory extract files . created necessary (see utils::unzip()).

title: Download OxCal — oxcal_download
code: if (FALSE) { ## Download OxCal oxcal_setup()  ## Custom script scr <- 'Plot()  {   Sequence("Sequence1")   {    Boundary("Begin");    Phase("Phase1")    {     R_Date("Lab-1",5000,25);     R_Date("Lab-2",4900,37);    };    Boundary("Between");    Phase("Phase2")    {     R_Date("Lab-3",4800,43);    };    Boundary("End");   };  };' out <- oxcal_execute(scr) res <- oxcal_parse(out)  plot(res) plot(res, likelihood = TRUE, posterior = FALSE) plot(res, likelihood = FALSE, posterior = TRUE) }

title: Execute an Oxcal Script — oxcal_execute
text: script character string instructions OxCal. file character string naming file (without extension) write script . Output files named file written directory. timeout integer value specifying timeout seconds, ignored 0. limit elapsed time running OxCal. Fractions seconds ignored (see system2()).

title: Execute an Oxcal Script — oxcal_execute
text: Invisibly returns list paths output files.

title: Execute an Oxcal Script — oxcal_execute
code: if (FALSE) { ## Download OxCal oxcal_setup()  ## Custom script scr <- 'Plot()  {   Sequence("Sequence1")   {    Boundary("Begin");    Phase("Phase1")    {     R_Date("Lab-1",5000,25);     R_Date("Lab-2",4900,37);    };    Boundary("Between");    Phase("Phase2")    {     R_Date("Lab-3",4800,43);    };    Boundary("End");   };  };' out <- oxcal_execute(scr) res <- oxcal_parse(out)  plot(res) plot(res, likelihood = TRUE, posterior = FALSE) plot(res, likelihood = FALSE, posterior = TRUE) }

what: Read and Parse OxCal Output — oxcal_parse
title: Read and Parse OxCal Output — oxcal_parse
Read and Parse OxCal Output — oxcal_parse
code: oxcal_parse(file)  # S3 method for OxCalFiles oxcal_parse(file)  # S3 method for character oxcal_parse(file)

title: Read and Parse OxCal Output — oxcal_parse
text: file character string naming JavaScript file data read (typically returned oxcal_execute()).

title: Read and Parse OxCal Output — oxcal_parse
text: list following elements: ocd list holding ranges, probability distributions, etc. parameter. model list containing information model. calib list containing information calibration curve.

title: Read and Parse OxCal Output — oxcal_parse
Read and Parse OxCal Output — oxcal_parse
Read and Parse OxCal Output — oxcal_parse
code: if (FALSE) { ## Download OxCal oxcal_setup()  ## Custom script scr <- 'Plot()  {   Sequence("Sequence1")   {    Boundary("Begin");    Phase("Phase1")    {     R_Date("Lab-1",5000,25);     R_Date("Lab-2",4900,37);    };    Boundary("Between");    Phase("Phase2")    {     R_Date("Lab-3",4800,43);    };    Boundary("End");   };  };' out <- oxcal_execute(scr) res <- oxcal_parse(out)  plot(res) plot(res, likelihood = TRUE, posterior = FALSE) plot(res, likelihood = FALSE, posterior = TRUE) }

title: Setup OxCal — oxcal_setup
code: oxcal_setup(path = NULL, os = NULL, ask = TRUE)

title: Setup OxCal — oxcal_setup
text: path character string specifying directory find OxCal executable (extract OxCal files ). os character string specifying operating system workstation. must one "Linux", "Windows" "Darwin". NULL (default), operating system determined automatically (see Sys.info()). ask logical scalar: OxCal installed, user asked download ? FALSE OxCal executable found, raise error. used R used interactively.

title: Setup OxCal — oxcal_setup
text: Downloads latest version Oxcal (needed) sets executable path correctly.

title: Setup OxCal — oxcal_setup
code: if (FALSE) { ## Download OxCal oxcal_setup()  ## Custom script scr <- 'Plot()  {   Sequence("Sequence1")   {    Boundary("Begin");    Phase("Phase1")    {     R_Date("Lab-1",5000,25);     R_Date("Lab-2",4900,37);    };    Boundary("Between");    Phase("Phase2")    {     R_Date("Lab-3",4800,43);    };    Boundary("End");   };  };' out <- oxcal_execute(scr) res <- oxcal_parse(out)  plot(res) plot(res, likelihood = TRUE, posterior = FALSE) plot(res, likelihood = FALSE, posterior = TRUE) }
